---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new module, endpoint, UI change, or capability
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Use case

<!-- What are you trying to do? Describe the workflow, not the feature.
     "I want to X so I can Y" is better than "add a button for Z". -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- How would you like this to work? API shape, UI affordance, module behavior — sketch as much as you have.
     If this overlaps with an existing module, say how it'd fit. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else have you tried? Other tools, workarounds, related features.
     Helps understand whether the real gap is in CHUB or elsewhere. -->

## Scope

- [ ] Frontend only
- [ ] Backend only
- [ ] Both
- [ ] New module
- [ ] New endpoint
- [ ] Config change

## Additional context

<!-- Screenshots, mockups, references to similar tools, links to upstream issues, etc. -->
